senses.gloss: to stone, to lapidate, to throw stones at
to expel, repudiate, banish, oust, exile, drive away

examples.text: وَلَقَدۡ زَيَّنَّا ٱلسَّمَآءَ ٱلدُّنۡيَا بِمَصَٰبِيحَ وَجَعَلۡنَٰهَا رُجُومٗا لِّلشَّيَٰطِينِۖ وَأَعۡتَدۡنَا لَهُمۡ عَذَابَ ٱلسَّعِيرِ.
examples.english: And verily We have beautified the world's heaven with lamps, and We have made them shooting stars for the devils, and for them We have prepared the doom of flame.

etymology.text: Compare Aramaic רגם (ragam), Classical Syriac ܪܓܡ (rəḡam) and Hebrew רָגַם (ragám).
